reasoning_model_2: The audio accurately reproduces the text '您好，请这边坐，为您准备了茶点。' without errors (00:00-00:03). The prosody is natural, and the pacing is well-measured. model_comparison: Both models achieve perfect scores on content accuracy and fluency, producing natural-sounding speech. The deciding factor is the adherence to the specific style prompt '圆润的音质' (mellow/rounded tone quality).
